title: Terms & Conditions
content:
Terms & Conditions

Review the official Terms and Conditions of PetStore Kenya (petstore.co.ke) Website.

These terms and conditions govern your use of the PetStore Kenya website (petstore.co.ke) and the purchase of any products from us. By accessing and using our website, you agree to comply with and be bound by these terms.
